# Handoff: web-payprof-switch-to-check-button

_Last updated: 2026-04-17T16:18:00Z_
_Branch: payprof-switch-to-check-button_

## Where we left off
Migrating the payment profile "Edit bank account" link to the standardized Check button component (`@gusto/ui/Button/Check`). Swapped the component in 2 of 3 callsites; last remaining callsite is in EditContractor.tsx. Jest snapshots for the swapped components need regenerating.

## Active work
- [ ] Finish button swap in `apps/gusto/src/pages/EditContractor.tsx:142`
- [ ] Regenerate Jest snapshots in `ContractorPaymentMethod.test.tsx` and `EmployeePaymentMethod.test.tsx`
- [ ] Verify ARIA label still reads as "Edit bank account" (we almost lost it in the first swap)

## Open PRs
- #14501 — Switch payment profile links to Check button — draft — https://github.com/Gusto/zenpayroll/pull/14501

## JIRA
- PAYPROF-1987 — Replace payment profile links with Check button — In Progress

## Key files
- `apps/gusto/src/pages/EditContractor.tsx` — remaining callsite, line 142
- `libs/ui/src/Button/Check.tsx` — shared Check button we're adopting
- `apps/gusto/src/components/ContractorPaymentMethod.test.tsx` — snapshot needs update
- `apps/gusto/src/components/EmployeePaymentMethod.test.tsx` — snapshot needs update

## Next steps / open questions
- Do the remaining callsite first, then do both snapshot regens in one commit so CI only runs once.
- Open question: should the Check button's `variant` be `'tertiary'` or `'secondary'` here? Design hasn't weighed in yet.

## Notes
- First attempted swap dropped the ARIA label because Check doesn't forward `aria-label` by default — use the `accessibilityLabel` prop instead.
- CI was green on last push; only the final callsite is blocking merge.
